steps: Re-score the application with the named channel neutralized.
Route to human review with the certificate attached.
Notify the candidate that the decision is being re-assessed.
message: This rejection was caused by the demographic embedding (photo/name): removing only that channel flips the decision, and the candidate clears the bar on competencies alone. Re-evaluate with the channel neutralized, route to human review, and notify the candidate of re-assessment.
